# personal-productivity

Personal workflow package for memory quality, verification loops, and debugging discipline.

## Included Skills
- `verify-debug-loop`: iterate verify/debug/fix cycles with explicit exit criteria.
- `memory-curator`: promote durable memory and remove stale or conflicting notes.

## Legacy command focus
`memory`, `feedback`, `hooks`, bundled `remember/simplify/verify/debug/skillify/batch/stuck/schedule`.
